decks.name: Morse Code
decks.description: Every letter A-Z and digit 0-9 in International Morse Code, ordered from the shortest codes to the longest. See the code, type the character.

decks.name: NATO Phonetic Alphabet
decks.description: The ICAO/NATO spelling alphabet from Alfa to Zulu, plus the ten digit pronunciations used in radio voice procedure, with official ICAO pronunciations.

decks.name: The Greek Alphabet
decks.description: All 24 Greek letters in order, uppercase and lowercase. See the glyphs, type the name. Extras give the sound, the Latin-lookalike traps (nu is not v, rho is not p), and where each letter earns its keep in math, stats, and ML papers.
